items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires deterministic validation of the scenario 'Takes payment in parking lot'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or produces a failure report. The lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
